highlights: Crash-safe Android startup with optional SDK isolation
WebRTC voice room reconnection, HTTPS guard and TURN diagnostics
248 countries and flags in player profiles
Server-authoritative idempotent round, tournament and club progression
Pasha x2 and stackable XP boosters
Club moderator permissions, announcements and club tournaments
Admin-uploaded table, card-back and profile-cover assets
Expanded victory effects, badges and large categorized emojis
Google, Facebook and Apple OAuth foundation
external_configuration_required: WARQNA_API_URL must point to the deployed HTTPS Laravel API
TURN credentials are required for reliable voice between different networks
Google, Facebook and Apple provider credentials and callback URLs
AdMob production IDs and Android signing secrets before store publication
